ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the interaction (e.g., Small, Base, Large) */,
  "intent_score" REAL /* Score indicating the intent behind the interaction */,
  "target_group_score" REAL /* Score indicating the target group involved */,
  "power_dynamics_score" REAL /* Score indicating the power dynamics present */,
  "implication_score" REAL /* Score indicating the implications of the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the interaction took place */,
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the context in which the interaction occurred */,
  "research_project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project associated with the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_implication_score FOREIGN KEY ("implication_score") REFERENCES implications ("implication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_size FOREIGN KEY ("size") REFERENCES sizes ("size_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_power_dynamics_score FOREIGN KEY ("power_dynamics_score") REFERENCES power_dynamics ("power_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_target_group_score FOREIGN KEY ("target_group_score") REFERENCES target_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotional_reactions" (
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotional reaction */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interaction associated with the reaction */,
  "emotional_response_score" REAL /* Score indicating the emotional reaction intensity */,
  "cognitive_response_score" REAL /* Score indicating the cognitive reaction intensity */,
  "offensiveness_score" REAL /* Score indicating the perceived offensiveness of the interaction */,
  "reaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the emotional reaction was recorded */,
  "reaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the emotional reaction in seconds */,
  "reaction_context_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the context in which the reaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotional_reactions_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the target group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target group */,
  "group_size" INTEGER /* Size of the target group */,
  "group_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the target group is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_dynamics" (
  "power_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power dynamic */,
  "power_description" TEXT /* Description of the power dynamic */,
  "dynamic_type" TEXT /* Type of power dynamic (e.g., hierarchical, collaborative) */,
  "dynamic_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the power dynamic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("power_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "averages" (
  "average_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each average score entry */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interaction associated with the average score */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Computed average score for the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("average_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_averages_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the interaction */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, analyze) */,
  "log_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the access activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_leader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project leader */,
  "project_participants" TEXT /* List of project participants */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_project_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
